title: Teladoc Health Q4 2025 Earnings Call Highlights - CEO Divita Strategy
text: Teladoc Health Q4 2025 Earnings Call Highlights - CEO Chuck Divita Strategy. Strategic Vision for 2026: Four strategic priorities - advancing Integrated Care in U.S., leveraging position in virtual mental health, driving value creation through international offerings, and operational excellence. 2026 Business Plan: Focused on product innovation in integrated care, scaling BetterHelp insurance offering, and continued operational efficiency. BetterHelp Insurance Expansion: Live in 20 states plus Washington D.C., 4,500+ credentialed and enrolled providers, network arrangements covering 120M+ lives, insurance sessions 1,200+ per day average, annualized revenue run rate $40M+. International Growth: Non-U.S. revenue 24% of BetterHelp segment revenue in 2025, localized launches in European countries. Product Innovation: Leading orchestration era to deliver, enable and dynamically coordinate care across patients, providers, platforms, specialties, settings. 2026 Guidance: Consolidated revenue $2.47B-$2.59B (approximately level with 2025 at midpoint), adjusted EBITDA $266M-$308M.
